goal.objective: Independently determine whether exact V12 candidate d914b273ba619e3cfa42206c8d9f136be73075e3 is release-ready across product truth, lifecycle correctness, and security/trace authority.

assumptions.statement: Every reviewed tracked source is byte-identical to candidate d914b273ba619e3cfa42206c8d9f136be73075e3.
assumptions.rationale: The review harness checks HEAD and every reviewed path before compiling digest-bound contracts.

assumptions.statement: The candidate producer is external to this audit goal; every compiled work unit is a read-only reviewer with no candidate write authority.
assumptions.rationale: Compiler-level producer/checker separation applies only when both duties are represented inside one goal. Here the immutable commit and digest-bound source manifest are the producer boundary.

assumptions.statement: V12 core creates, restores, inspects, and records immutable evidence sessions but does not launch, persist, schedule, integrate, merge, or mutate memory.
assumptions.rationale: Review must judge the implemented provider-neutral contract rather than the deferred runtime layer.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Audit V12 lifecycle correctness, deterministic recovery, dependency eligibility, exact fan-in, terminal routing, immutability, and adversarial coverage.

evidenceRequirements.description: Preserve the exact independent LifecycleCorrectnessReleaseReview evidence.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Audit whether V12 presents one accurate, simple, IDE-neutral path from an approved package through visible specialist work to verified integration handoff.

evidenceRequirements.description: Preserve the exact independent ProductApiIdeReleaseReview evidence.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Audit V12 security, source preservation, exact identity, authority closure, traceability, approval freshness, and external-host boundary for release.

evidenceRequirements.description: Preserve the exact independent SecurityTraceAuthorityReleaseReview evidence.

contextSources.description: Integrated adversarial, permutation, restore, and limit tests.
Immutable candidate commit and complete reviewed-source binding manifest.
Public V12 limits and contract constants.
Preserved failures, diagnoses, and causal corrections.
V12 create, restore, identity, and boundary tests.
V11 exact raw handoff and fan-in verifier composed by V12.
Integrated implementation and verification evidence summary.
V12 DAG inspection and readiness tests.
Reusable module contract for the run session.
V11 approved-package verification and manifest resolution.
Closed V12 public and wire types.
Published schema semantics and host boundary.
V12 strict schema and public export tests.
V12 transition, replay, and route tests.
Exact independent semantic audit PASS handoff.

forbiddenEffects: Do not edit files, change Git state, access the network, launch descendants, repair findings, or claim that core performs external host effects.

workUnits.objective: Audit V12 lifecycle correctness, deterministic recovery, dependency eligibility, exact fan-in, terminal routing, immutability, and adversarial coverage.

module.action: Trace all four operations through representative DAGs and every non-pass route; inspect validation precedence, replay, fresh-process restore, limits, tests, and dogfood without repairing production.
